languages.text: When enabled, weapon attacks that can overpenetrate will have the same chance to cause ricochet instead. When this happens, the attack will also {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} another creature or object in a radius around the intended target, although the damage to targets beyond the first is usually lower.

traits.locale_text: When enabled, weapon attacks that can overpenetrate will have the same chance to cause ricochet instead. When this happens, the attack will also {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} another creature or object in a radius around the intended target, although the damage to targets beyond the first is usually lower.

languages.text: When activated, weapon attacks with {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}overpenetration{/g} instead have the same chance to ricochet. On a ricochet, damage is dealt to a random creature or object within a small radius around the initial target. This damage is often reduced.

When this happens, the attack will also {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} another creature or object in a radius around the intended target, although the damage to targets beyond the first is usually lower.

When activated, weapon attacks with {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}overpenetration{/g} instead have the same chance to ricochet. On a ricochet, damage is dealt to a random creature or object within a small radius around the initial target. This damage is often reduced.

languages.text: При активации атаки оружием со {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}сквозным пробитием{/g} вместо этого имеют тот же шанс вызвать рикошет. При рикошете урон наносится случайному существу или объекту в небольшом радиусе вокруг изначальной цели. Этот урон, как правило, меньше обычного.
languages.original_text: When activated, weapon attacks with {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}overpenetration{/g} instead have the same chance to ricochet. On a ricochet, damage is dealt to a random creature or object within a small radius around the initial target. This damage is often reduced.

traits.locale_text: При активации атаки оружием со {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}сквозным пробитием{/g} вместо этого имеют тот же шанс вызвать рикошет. При рикошете урон наносится случайному существу или объекту в небольшом радиусе вокруг изначальной цели. Этот урон, как правило, меньше обычного.

При активации атаки оружием со {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}сквозным пробитием{/g} вместо этого имеют тот же шанс вызвать рикошет. При рикошете урон наносится случайному существу или объекту в небольшом радиусе вокруг изначальной цели. Этот урон, как правило, меньше обычного.

languages.text: Cuando esta opción esté activa, los ataques de arma que tengan {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}sobrepenetración{/g} tendrán en su lugar la misma probabilidad de rebotar. Al producirse un rebote, se inflige daño a una criatura u objeto elegido al azar dentro de un pequeño radio en torno al objetivo original. Este daño suele verse reducido.
languages.original_text: When activated, weapon attacks with {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}overpenetration{/g} instead have the same chance to ricochet. On a ricochet, damage is dealt to a random creature or object within a small radius around the initial target. This damage is often reduced.

traits.locale_text: Cuando esta opción esté activa, los ataques de arma que tengan {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}sobrepenetración{/g} tendrán en su lugar la misma probabilidad de rebotar. Al producirse un rebote, se inflige daño a una criatura u objeto elegido al azar dentro de un pequeño radio en torno al objetivo original. Este daño suele verse reducido.

languages.text: Wenn aktiviert, haben Waffenangriffe mit {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}Überdurchdringung{/g} stattdessen dieselbe Chance auf "Rückschlag". Im Falle eines Rückschlags erleidet eine zufällige Kreatur oder ein Objekt in einem kleinen Radius um das Ausgansziel Schaden. Dieser Schaden wird oft reduziert.
languages.original_text: When activated, weapon attacks with {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}overpenetration{/g} instead have the same chance to ricochet. On a ricochet, damage is dealt to a random creature or object within a small radius around the initial target. This damage is often reduced.

traits.locale_text: Wenn aktiviert, haben Waffenangriffe mit {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}Überdurchdringung{/g} stattdessen dieselbe Chance auf "Rückschlag". Im Falle eines Rückschlags erleidet eine zufällige Kreatur oder ein Objekt in einem kleinen Radius um das Ausgansziel Schaden. Dieser Schaden wird oft reduziert.

languages.text: Etkinleştirildiğinde {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}delip geçme{/g} özelliğine sahip silah saldırıları, bunun yerine aynı oranda mermi sekmesi olasılığına sahip olur. Mermi sektiğinde hasar, ilk hedefin etrafındaki küçük bir yarıçap içinde bulunan rastgele bir yaratık veya nesneye verilir. Bu hasar, ilk hedefe verilecek hasara kıyasla genellikle azdır.
languages.original_text: When activated, weapon attacks with {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}overpenetration{/g} instead have the same chance to ricochet. On a ricochet, damage is dealt to a random creature or object within a small radius around the initial target. This damage is often reduced.

traits.locale_text: Etkinleştirildiğinde {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}delip geçme{/g} özelliğine sahip silah saldırıları, bunun yerine aynı oranda mermi sekmesi olasılığına sahip olur. Mermi sektiğinde hasar, ilk hedefin etrafındaki küçük bir yarıçap içinde bulunan rastgele bir yaratık veya nesneye verilir. Bu hasar, ilk hedefe verilecek hasara kıyasla genellikle azdır.

languages.text: Une fois cet effet activé, les attaques armées avec {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}surpénétration{/g} bénéficient à la place des mêmes chances de ricocher. En cas de ricochet, les dégâts sont infligés à une créature ou un objet aléatoire dans un rayon restreint autour de la cible initiale et sont souvent réduits.
languages.original_text: When activated, weapon attacks with {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}overpenetration{/g} instead have the same chance to ricochet. On a ricochet, damage is dealt to a random creature or object within a small radius around the initial target. This damage is often reduced.

traits.locale_text: Une fois cet effet activé, les attaques armées avec {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}surpénétration{/g} bénéficient à la place des mêmes chances de ricocher. En cas de ricochet, les dégâts sont infligés à une créature ou un objet aléatoire dans un rayon restreint autour de la cible initiale et sont souvent réduits.

languages.text: 激活后，具有{g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}过度穿透{/g}效果的武器攻击会以相同的几率改为触发跳弹。 触发跳弹时，对初始目标附近小范围内的一个随机生物或物体造成伤害。该伤害通常会有所衰减。
languages.original_text: When activated, weapon attacks with {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}overpenetration{/g} instead have the same chance to ricochet. On a ricochet, damage is dealt to a random creature or object within a small radius around the initial target. This damage is often reduced.

traits.locale_text: 激活后，具有{g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}过度穿透{/g}效果的武器攻击会以相同的几率改为触发跳弹。 触发跳弹时，对初始目标附近小范围内的一个随机生物或物体造成伤害。该伤害通常会有所衰减。

languages.text:
攻撃が有効化すると、{g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}貫通{/g}攻撃は代わりに弾き返される確率が同じになる。
弾き返されると、最初の標的の周囲の小さな範囲内のランダムな生き物や物体にダメージが与えられる。このダメージはしばしば軽減される。
languages.original_text: When activated, weapon attacks with {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}overpenetration{/g} instead have the same chance to ricochet. On a ricochet, damage is dealt to a random creature or object within a small radius around the initial target. This damage is often reduced.

traits.locale_text:
攻撃が有効化すると、{g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}貫通{/g}攻撃は代わりに弾き返される確率が同じになる。
弾き返されると、最初の標的の周囲の小さな範囲内のランダムな生き物や物体にダメージが与えられる。このダメージはしばしば軽減される。
